_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of policy-based and risk adaptive access controls.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforcement mechanisms, exception handling processes, and policy lifecycle management.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.519), SP-K-014 (SP, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.557). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, policy]. DCWF-only terms [access, adaptive, based, controls, risk] vs WIDAI-only terms [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.905, R=0.879). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Knowledge of policy-based and risk adaptive access controls." and "Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.582 ≈ STS 0.557 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, policy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, policy]. DCWF-only: [access, adaptive, based, controls, risk]. WIDAI-only: [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle].
